title: MikroTik TG-LR82, IoT LoRaWAN sensor tag
description: The MikroTik TG-LR82 is a wireless temperature, humidity, motion, and tilt sensor featuring a magnetic reed switch , up to 5 year battery life, IP67 protection and local data processing . It communicates with a gateway using the LoRa (868MHz) protocol and also supports LoRa in the 2.4GHz band, enabling deployment without regional frequency restrictions. It supports multiple configuration profiles and event-based rules , allowing the device to adapt automatically to changing conditions Device Screws Mounting bracket
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 868 MHz, LoRa 2.4 GHz Power Battery capacity [mAh] 1100
